revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Room |title = [[Room]]s and spaces of a [[house]] |bodyclass = hlist |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |abbr1 = shared |group1 = [[Common area|Shared rooms]] |state1 = autocollapse |list1 = * [[Bonus room]] * [[Common room]] * [[Den (room)|Den]] * [[Dining room]] * [[Family room]] * [[Garret]] * [[Great room]] * [[Home cinema]] * [[Kitchen]] ** [[dirty kitchen]] ** [[kitchenette]] * [[Living room]] * [[Gynaeceum]] ** [[harem]] * [[Andron (architecture)|Andron]] ** [[man cave]] * [[Recreation room]] ** [[billiard room]] * [[Shrine]] * [[Study (room)|Study]] * [[Sunroom]] |abbr2 = private |group2 = Private rooms |state2 = autocollapse |list2 = * [[Bathroom]] ** [[Toilet (room)|toilet]] * [[Bedroom]] / Guest room ** [[closet]] * [[Bedsit|Bedsit / Miniflat]] * [[Boudoir]] * [[Cabinet (room)|Cabinet]] * [[Nursery (room)|Nursery]] |abbr3 = passages |group3 = Spaces |state3 = autocollapse |list3 = * [[Atrium (architecture)|Atrium]] * [[Balcony]] * [[Breezeway]] * [[Conversation pit]] * [[Cubby-hole]] * [[Deck (building)|Deck]] * [[Elevator]] ** [[dumbwaiter]] * [[Entryway]]/[[Genkan]] * [[Fireplace]] ** [[hearth]] * [[Lobby (room)|Foyer]] * [[Hall]] * [[Hallway]] * [[Inglenook]] * [[Lanai_(architecture)|Lanai]] * [[Loft]] * [[Loggia]] * [[Overhang (architecture)|Overhang]] * [[Patio]] * [[Porch]] ** [[Screened porch|screened]] ** [[Sleeping porch|sleeping]] * [[Wheelchair ramp|Ramp]] * [[Secret passage]] * [[Stairs]]/[[Staircase]] * [[Terrace (building)|Terrace]] * [[Veranda]] * [[Vestibule (architecture)|Vestibule]] |abbr4 = utility |group4 = [[Technical room|Technical]], [[Utility room|utility]]
and [[Storage room|storage]] |state4 = autocollapse |list4 = * [[Attic]] * [[Basement]] * [[Carport]] * [[Cloakroom]] * [[Closet]] * [[Crawl space]] * [[Electrical room]] * [[Equipment room]] * [[Furnace room]] / [[Mechanical room|Boiler room]] * [[Garage (residential)|Garage]] * [[Janitorial closet]] * [[Larder]] * [[Laundry room]] / [[Utility room]] / [[Storage room]] * [[Mechanical room]] / [[Mechanical floor|floor]] * [[Pantry]] * [[Root cellar]] * [[Semi-basement]] * [[Storm cellar]] / [[Safe room]] * [[Studio]] * [[Wardrobe]] * [[Wine cellar]] * [[Wiring closet]] * [[Workshop]] |abbr5 = great |group5 = [[Great house]] areas |state5 = autocollapse |list5 = * [[Antechamber]] * [[Ballroom]] * Kitchen-related ** [[butler's pantry]] ** [[Buttery (room)|buttery]] ** [[saucery]] ** [[scullery]] ** [[spicery]] ** [[still room]] * [[Conservatory (greenhouse)|Conservatory]] / [[Orangery]] * [[Courtyard]] * [[Drawing room]] * [[Great chamber]] * [[Great hall]] * [[Library]] * [[Long gallery]] * [[Lumber room]] * [[Parlour]] * [[Sauna]] * [[Servants' hall]] * [[Servants' quarters]] * [[Smoking room]] * [[Solar (room)|Solar]] * [[State room]] * [[Swimming pool]] * [[Turret (architecture)|Turret]] * [[Undercroft]] |abbr6 = [[Building]] elements |group6 = Other |state6 = autocollapse |list6 = * [[Furniture]] * [[Hidden compartment|Hidden room]] * [[House]] ** [[house plan]] ** [[List of house styles|styles]] ** [[List of house types|types]] * [[Multi-family residential]] * [[Secondary suite]] * [[Duplex (building)|Duplex]] * [[Terraced house|Terraced]] * [[Single-family detached home|Detached]] * [[Semi-detached]] * [[Townhouse]] * [[Studio apartment]] |abbr7 = elements |group7 = [[Architecture|Architectural]]
elements |state7 = autocollapse |list7 = * [[Arch]] * [[Balconet]] * [[Baluster]] * [[Belt course]] * [[Bressummer]] * [[Ceiling]] * [[Chimney]] * [[Colonnade]] / [[Portico]] * [[Column]] * [[Cornice]] / [[Eaves]] * [[Dome]] * [[Door]] * [[Ell (architecture)|Ell]] * [[Floor]] * [[Foundation (engineering)|Foundation]] * [[Gable]] * [[Gate]] ** [[Portal (architecture)|Portal]] * [[Lighting]] * [[Ornament (art)|Ornament]] * [[Plumbing]] * [[Quoin]]s * [[Roof]] * [[Roof lantern]] * [[Sill plate]] * [[Architectural style|Style]] ** [[List of architectural styles|list]] * [[Skylight]] * [[Threshold (architecture)|Threshold]] * [[Transom (architecture)|Transom]] * [[Vault (architecture)|Vault]] * [[Wall]] * [[Window]] |group8 = Related |list8 = * [[Backyard]] * [[Driveway]] * [[Front yard]] * [[Back garden|Garden]] * [[Home]] * [[Home improvement]] * [[Home repair]] * [[Shed]] * [[Tree house]] | below = *{{category-inline|Rooms}} }} [[Category:Housing navigational boxes]] {{documentation}}

{{Navbox |name = Room |title = [[Room]]s and spaces of a [[house]] |bodyclass = hlist |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |abbr1 = shared |group1 = [[Common area|Shared rooms]] |state1 = autocollapse |list1 = * [[Bonus room]] * [[Common room]] * [[Den (room)|Den]] * [[Dining room]] * [[Family room]] * [[Garret]] * [[Great room]] * [[Home cinema]] * [[Kitchen]] ** [[dirty kitchen]] ** [[kitchenette]] * [[Living room]] * [[Gynaeceum]] ** [[harem]] * [[Andron (architecture)|Andron]] ** [[man cave]] * [[Recreation room]] ** [[billiard room]] * [[Shrine]] * [[Study (room)|Study]] * [[Sunroom]] |abbr2 = private |group2 = Private rooms |state2 = autocollapse |list2 = * [[Bathroom]] ** [[Toilet (room)|toilet]] * [[Bedroom]] / Guest room ** [[closet]] * [[Bedsit|Bedsit / Miniflat]] * [[Boudoir]] * [[Cabinet (room)|Cabinet]] * [[Nursery (room)|Nursery]] |abbr3 = passages |group3 = Spaces |state3 = autocollapse |list3 = * [[Atrium (architecture)|Atrium]] * [[Balcony]] * [[Breezeway]] * [[Conversation pit]] * [[Cubby-hole]] * [[Deck (building)|Deck]] * [[Elevator]] ** [[dumbwaiter]] * [[Entryway]]/[[Genkan]] * [[Fireplace]] ** [[hearth]] * [[Lobby (room)|Foyer]] * [[Hall]] * [[Hallway]] * [[Inglenook]] * [[Lanai_(architecture)|Lanai]] * [[Loft]] * [[Loggia]] * [[Overhang (architecture)|Overhang]] * [[Patio]] * [[Porch]] ** [[Screened porch|screened]] ** [[Sleeping porch|sleeping]] * [[Wheelchair ramp|Ramp]] * [[Secret passage]] * [[Stairs]]/[[Staircase]] * [[Terrace (building)|Terrace]] * [[Veranda]] * [[Vestibule (architecture)|Vestibule]] |abbr4 = utility |group4 = [[Technical room|Technical]], [[Utility room|utility]]
and [[Storage room|storage]] |state4 = autocollapse |list4 = * [[Attic]] * [[Basement]] * [[Carport]] * [[Cloakroom]] * [[Closet]] * [[Crawl space]] * [[Electrical room]] * [[Equipment room]] * [[Furnace room]] / [[Mechanical room|Boiler room]] * [[Garage (residential)|Garage]] * [[Janitorial closet]] * [[Larder]] * [[Laundry room]] / [[Utility room]] / [[Storage room]] * [[Mechanical room]] / [[Mechanical floor|floor]] * [[Pantry]] * [[Root cellar]] * [[Semi-basement]] * [[Storm cellar]] / [[Safe room]] * [[Studio]] * [[Wardrobe]] * [[Wine cellar]] * [[Wiring closet]] * [[Workshop]] |abbr5 = great |group5 = [[Great house]] areas |state5 = autocollapse |list5 = * [[Antechamber]] * [[Ballroom]] * Kitchen-related ** [[butler's pantry]] ** [[Buttery (room)|buttery]] ** [[saucery]] ** [[scullery]] ** [[spicery]] ** [[still room]] * [[Conservatory (greenhouse)|Conservatory]] / [[Orangery]] * [[Courtyard]] * [[Drawing room]] * [[Great chamber]] * [[Great hall]] * [[Library]] * [[Long gallery]] * [[Lumber room]] * [[Parlour]] * [[Sauna]] * [[Servants' hall]] * [[Servants' quarters]] * [[Smoking room]] * [[Solar (room)|Solar]] * [[State room]] * [[Swimming pool]] * [[Turret (architecture)|Turret]] * [[Undercroft]] |abbr6 = [[Building]] elements |group6 = Other |state6 = autocollapse |list6 = * [[Furniture]] * [[Hidden compartment|Hidden room]] * [[House]] ** [[house plan]] ** [[List of house styles|styles]] ** [[List of house types|types]] * [[Multi-family residential]] * [[Secondary suite]] * [[Duplex (building)|Duplex]] * [[Terraced house|Terraced]] * [[Single-family detached home|Detached]] * [[Semi-detached]] * [[Townhouse]] * [[Studio apartment]] |abbr7 = elements |group7 = [[Architecture|Architectural]]
elements |state7 = autocollapse |list7 = * [[Arch]] * [[Balconet]] * [[Baluster]] * [[Belt course]] * [[Bressummer]] * [[Ceiling]] * [[Chimney]] * [[Colonnade]] / [[Portico]] * [[Column]] * [[Cornice]] / [[Eaves]] * [[Dome]] * [[Door]] * [[Ell (architecture)|Ell]] * [[Floor]] * [[Foundation (engineering)|Foundation]] * [[Gable]] * [[Gate]] ** [[Portal (architecture)|Portal]] * [[Lighting]] * [[Ornament (art)|Ornament]] * [[Plumbing]] * [[Quoin]]s * [[Roof]] * [[Roof lantern]] * [[Sill plate]] * [[Architectural style|Style]] ** [[List of architectural styles|list]] * [[Skylight]] * [[Threshold (architecture)|Threshold]] * [[Transom (architecture)|Transom]] * [[Vault (architecture)|Vault]] * [[Wall]] * [[Window]] |group8 = Related |list8 = * [[Backyard]] * [[Driveway]] * [[Front yard]] * [[Back garden|Garden]] * [[Home]] * [[Home improvement]] * [[Home repair]] * [[Shed]] * [[Tree house]] | below = *{{category-inline|Rooms}} }} [[Category:Housing navigational boxes]] {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
